tool_args.label: MTA Staten Island Railway February Financial Plan 2023-2026

payload.title: MTA Staten Island Railway February Financial Plan 2023-2026 2022 Final Estimate and 2023 Adopted Budget
payload.description: MTA Staten Island Railway's 2022 Final Estimate, 2023 Adopted Budget and Financial Plan for 2023-2026, including reconciliation to the November Plan, statement of operations, cash receipts and expenditures, ridership and revenue data, and position counts.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Staten Island Railway, an MTA agency operating fixed-route rail service on Staten Island.

warnings: entity.parent_organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent organizations are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.
entity.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher can be a source role or related organization; mixed usage is not a safe enum. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Monthly Allocation of Financials for Board Reporting

payload.claim_text: The attached also includes schedules detailing the monthly allocation of financials, including headcount and utilization data, based on the 2023 Adopted Budget for the purpose of reporting actual results on a monthly basis to the Board.
